---
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

**STAT 306 Interim Proposal**

Group Members:

A\) Data Source and Collection

We will use the Life Expectancy (WHO) dataset from Kaggle. This dataset
was compiled from the World Health Organization (WHO) Global Health
Observatory data repository and United Nations economic data covering
the years 2000–2015 for 193 countries. It contains health, demographic,
socioeconomic, and immunization indicators related to life expectancy.
Data were merged into one dataset with 22 columns and 2938 observations.

B\) Variable Description

| variable name | variable type | description |
|---------------------------------|------------------|---------------------|
| Country | categorical | Name of the country |
| Year | numerical | Year of observation |
| Status | categorical |  |
| Life expectancy | numberic |  |
| Adult Mortality | numberic | Adult Mortality Rates of both sexes (probability of dying between 15 and 60 years per 1000 population) |
| infant deaths | numberic | Number of Infant Deaths per 1000 population |
| Alcohol | numberic | Alcohol, recorded per capita (15+) consumption (in litres of pure alcohol) |
| percentage expenditure | numberic | Expenditure on health as a percentage of Gross Domestic Product per capita(%) |
| Hepatitis B | numberic | Hepatitis B (HepB) immunization coverage among 1-year-olds (%) |
| Measles | numberic | number of reported cases per 1000 population |
| BMI | numberic | Average Body Mass Index of entire population |
| under-five deaths | numberic | Number of under-five deaths per 1000 population |
| Polio | numberic | Polio (Pol3) immunization coverage among 1-year-olds (%) |
| Total expenditure | numberic | General government expenditure on health as a percentage of total government expenditure (%) |
| Diphtheria | numberic | Diphtheria tetanus toxoid and pertussis (DTP3) immunization coverage among 1-year-olds (%) |
| HIV/AIDS | numberic | Deaths per 1 000 live births HIV/AIDS (0-4 years) |
| GDP | numberic | Gross Domestic Product per capita (in USD) |
| Population | numberic | Population of the country |
| thinness 1-19 years | numberic | 是 |
| thinness 5-9 years | numberic | 是 |
| Income composition of resources | numberic | 是 |
| Schooling | numberic | 是 |

C\) Research Question and Context

D\) Group Roles and Responsibilities
